name: Chicken Delish
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CHICKEN FILLING-------------------------------
3 cups Cooked Chicken, Drain
1 cup Cooked Ham
1/2 cup Mushrooms, finely chopped
-----------------------------------BROTH-----------------------------------
2 cups Hot Chicken Broth
1 cup Cream
1 teaspoon Salt
1/4 teaspoon Pepper
1/8 teaspoon Allspice
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in butter until particles are fine.
3. Combine egg with milk.
4. Add to dry ingredients; stir until dough is formed.
5. Divide into 2 parts: one slightly larger.
6. Roll out the larger piece on a floured surface to a 15x12-inch rectangle.
7. Transfer to an ungreased 12x8-inch baking dish, pressing dough against sides and bottom.
8. CHICKEN FILLING: Combine chicken, ham, mushroom pieces, flour, and almonds; spread over the pastry.
9. Roll out remaining dough to a 12x7-inch rectangle.
10. Cut lengthwise into 1-inch strips.
11. Place 4 strips lengthwise over filling.
12. Cut remaining strips in half and place crosswise over filling, making a lattice top.
13. Combine broth, cream, salt, nutmeg, allspice, and pepper.
14. Pour over the lattice top.
15. Bake at 375°F for 45 to 50 minutes until golden brown.
